arts.ttl: Premier League threatened with legal action over spending changes that will impact Newcastle United
arts.sum: The plan to bring in new financial rules in the Premier League has caused a letter to be sent by the players' union and the 20 member clubs alleging the deliberate withholding of information and a 'flagrant breach' of an agreement stating the PFA must be consulted on matters that impact both the pay and conditions of PFA players. The lawyer who played an integral role in Newcastle United's 2021 takeover, Nick De Marco, is now taking the fight to the Premier League after the PFA threatened to take legal action.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Birmingham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United travel to Birmingham City in one of the most intriguing clashes of the FA Cup’s fourth round. Eddie Howe’s side secured a place in the Carabao Cup final on Wednesday and are now aiming for success in another cup competition. arts.ttl: Newcastle United FA Cup progress could hinge on veteran star yet to make debut
arts.sum: In 38-year-old veteran stopper John Ruddy, Howe knows he has a bank of Blues knowledge to tap into ahead of the fourth round clash at St. Andrew's @ Knighthead Park. Howe told Chronicle Live: "John Ruddy has knowledge of most clubs!

arts.ttl: Birmingham vs Newcastle Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle will look to follow up their progression to the EFL Cup final by booking a place in the next round of the FA Cup at Birmingham’s expense this evening. Ahead of the clash, we’ve ...

arts.ttl: I left Newcastle United after just seven months amid PSR battle for a totally different challenge
arts.sum: “It was just a brief conversation [with Juve boss Motta] because it was a busy morning so I’m sure we’ll have another time to sit down and go through a lot of things," Kelly told Juventus TV. Howe was keen to keep Kelly until at least the end of the campaign given his thin squad at present but selling a fringe asset for £20m, just months after snapping him up for free, is too good an offer to turn down in the world of PSR.

arts.ttl: Vertu Trophy semi-final draw, Birmingham City's possible opponents and prize money
arts.sum: Birmingham City are through to the semi-finals of the Vertu Trophy, and a day out at Wembley draws ever closer, after they edged out League One counterparts Stevenage on Tuesday night. There is no more regionalising of the draw now that we have reached the final four of the competition, meaning Blues could be home or away to one of a number of possible opponents in the semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's one-word Liverpool fear ahead of Newcastle United Carabao Cup final clash
arts.sum: Liverpool were shocked by the approach of Howe's men that evening under the lights and their captain Virgil van Dijk has warned his team-mates that they must prepare for another 'intense' experience. Newcastle United will face Liverpool in the Carabao Cup Final after the Reds disposed of Tottenham Hotspur in their semi-final second leg at Anfield.

arts.ttl: FA Cup predictions: Birmingham to spring Newcastle shock?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight as he analyses the weekend's FA Cup fourth-round action and makes a case for Birmingham to beat Newcastle.

With the Gunners competing on multiple fronts, Arteta is keen to add depth to his backline.
